shortDesc: A pure and sophisticated blend of blooming white florals
desc:
Nufra is a refined floral fragrance that celebrates purity and grace. It opens with a fresh and natural
floral brightness, gradually revealing a rich heart of blooming white flowers. The base adds a soft
powdery warmth with a touch of woody depth, creating a smooth and balanced finish.
Elegant and modern, Nufra is a timeless addition to any fragrance collection.
